message:
feat(node): SHA-256 prefix validation, directory name sanitization, symlink-safe package.json reading, and continued push_bounded fixes

Add normalize_sha256_prefix() helper that validates sha256: references
used in trust quarantine and fleet agent action resolution — enforces a
minimum 8-character hex prefix, rejects non-hex characters, and
normalizes to lowercase. This closes an input validation gap where
arbitrarily short prefixes like "sha256:d" could match unintended
artifacts. Both quarantine_trust_cards() and
resolve_fleet_agent_action_targets() now validate and trim their inputs.

Sanitize registry_entry_directory_name() to replace path-unsafe
characters (/, \, @, etc.) with hyphens and append a 12-char SHA-256
digest suffix, preventing directory traversal via crafted extension IDs.
Add test coverage for the sanitization.

Harden read_package_manifest_object() in main.rs and
project_prefers_bun() in engine_dispatcher.rs to canonicalize
package.json paths and verify they stay within the project root,
preventing symlink-based path traversal.

Add run_command_capture_output() in engine_dispatcher.rs that spawns
dedicated reader threads for stdout/stderr before entering the wait
loop, matching the same deadlock prevention pattern applied to main.rs
in the previous commit. Replace both .output() call sites.

Replace raw git command invocations in BuildContext (detect_git_sha,
detect_repository_url) with the bounded run_command_capture_stdout
helper to prevent hangs when git is unresponsive.

Extend inspect_release_entry_path() to reject non-Normal path
components (ParentDir, CurDir, RootDir, Prefix) before symlink checks.

Fix fleet agent action loop to break after processing an action that
fails, instead of continuing to process remaining actions in a
potentially inconsistent state. Track actions_processed incrementally.

Fix zero-total-nodes edge case in fleet quarantine convergence state
to use Pending phase instead of Propagating.

Fix session_auth demo functions to use handshake_mac directly instead
of re-fetching it from the session manager.

Continue push_bounded / push_fixture ordering fixes in
fsqlite_inspired_suite, ecosystem_registry, cancellation_injection,
approval_workflow, compat_gates, staking_governance, obligation_channel,
and quarantine modules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
